_note: These payloads hit deterministic fixtures in the mock Clearbit API, so each labelled tier is stable for the demo.

high_tier.expected: stripe.com → mock API fixture → 8000 employees (5pt) + Tech (3pt) = 8 → HIGH → Slack + CRM Deal

medium_tier.expected: midmarket.io → mock API fixture → 200 employees (3pt) + Retail (1pt) = 4 → MEDIUM → Nurture campaign

low_tier.expected: localbakery.com → mock API fixture → 12 employees (1pt) + Food (1pt) = 2 → LOW → Resources email

invalid.expected: Validator flags → IF routes to Respond 400 with a clear error message
